# Monster Pet Collection

> A free-to-play browser game where you collect, train and battle 3D monsters across themed islands. Earn coins, unlock cards, and build the ultimate creature collection.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Play the game — collect monsters, roll dice, explore islands, and complete daily missions.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Coin packs, dice tier upgrades, season passes, and bundles.
- [Privacy](/privacy): How we collect and handle player data.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service for using the game.
- [Refunds](/refund): 30-day money-back guarantee handled by Paddle.
- [Acceptable Use](/acceptable-use): Rules for fair play and account conduct.
